# Generated — do not edit

Everything under `vendor/` (and the adapter `src/`/`tests/` files and
`fixtures/`) is generated from the Quay source tree by its sync script.
The source of truth lives in the Quay monorepo; hand edits here will be
overwritten by the next sync and will never flow upstream.

Found a bug or need a change? Report it to the Quay team instead.
